requirement_topic.en: IFT Homologacion — Radio and Telecom Terminal Type Approval (LFTR 2014)
requirement_topic.zh: IFT产品认证——无线电及电信终端型式认可（2014年LFTR）
requirement_topic.zht: IFT產品認證——無線電及電信終端型式認可（2014年LFTR）

summary.en: All radio transmitters and telecom terminal equipment (including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT modules) must obtain an IFT homologacion certificate from the Instituto Federal de Telecomunicaciones before import or sale in Mexico, as mandated by the Ley Federal de Telecomunicaciones y Radiodifusion (LFTR) 2014 and associated IFT resolutions. The product must be listed in the IFT Catalogo de Equipos Homologados. Applications are submitted via IFT-accredited Organismos de Certificacion (OC); testing must be conducted by IFT-recognised laboratories. FCC certification and CE marking are not recognised for IFT homologacion purposes; however, under USMCA mutual-recognition provisions, FCC test data may be accepted as input to the IFT review process and can shorten timelines without substituting for the IFT certificate itself.
summary.zh: 依据2014年《联邦电信与广播法》（LFTR）及IFT相关决议，所有无线电发射机和电信终端设备（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及蜂窝物联网模块）须在进口或于墨西哥销售前取得联邦电信监管委员会（IFT）颁发的产品认证证书。产品须列入IFT设备认证目录。申请须通过IFT认可的认证机构（OC）提交，测试须由IFT认可实验室完成。FCC认证和CE标志不被IFT产品认证承认；但依据《美墨加协定》（USMCA）相互认可条款，FCC测试数据可作为IFT审查的参考输入，有助于缩短认证周期，但不能替代IFT证书本身。
summary.zht: 依據2014年《聯邦電信與廣播法》（LFTR）及IFT相關決議，所有無線電發射機和電信終端設備（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及蜂窩物聯網模組）須在進口或於墨西哥銷售前取得聯邦電信監管委員會（IFT）頒發的產品認證證書。產品須列入IFT設備認證目錄。申請須通過IFT認可的認證機構（OC）提交，測試須由IFT認可實驗室完成。FCC認證和CE標誌不被IFT產品認證承認；但依據《美墨加協定》（USMCA）相互認可條款，FCC測試數據可作為IFT審查的參考輸入，有助於縮短認證週期，但不能取代IFT證書本身。

standards_or_laws: Ley Federal de Telecomunicaciones y Radiodifusion (LFTR) 2014 — homologacion obligation
IFT resolutions on equipment homologacion procedure
IFT Catalogo de Equipos Homologados — mandatory listing before import or sale
USMCA Chapter 15 — Technical Barriers to Trade; MRA provisions on conformity assessment

summary.en: In China, intentional radio transmitters require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval issued by MIIT, with a CMIIT ID label on the device. Wi-Fi and Bluetooth modules are covered by SRRC approval under YD/T and related GB standards. Applicable categories also require a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC certification covers electrical safety and some EMC requirements separately.
summary.zh: 在中国，有意无线电发射机须取得MIIT颁发的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型式认可，并在设备上标注CMIIT ID。Wi-Fi和蓝牙模块依据YD/T及相关GB标准受SRRC认可管辖。适用类别还须取得MIIT网络访问许可（NAL）。CCC认证另行涵盖电气安全及部分EMC要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，有意無線電發射機須取得MIIT頒發的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型式認可，並在設備上標注CMIIT ID。Wi-Fi和藍牙模組依據YD/T及相關GB標準受SRRC認可管轄。適用類別還須取得MIIT網路訪問許可（NAL）。CCC認證另行涵蓋電氣安全及部分EMC要求。

standards_or_laws: SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval — MIIT / CMIIT ID labelling
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for applicable telecom terminal categories
YD/T series — telecom terminal technical standards
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (electrical safety and EMC)

gap.en: Hard gap — SRRC type approval and CMIIT ID are not recognised by IFT; a separate IFT homologacion application via an IFT-accredited OC is mandatory. MIIT NAL approval has no Mexican equivalent and is not transferable. FCC test reports (where available) may shorten IFT review under USMCA provisions but do not substitute for the IFT certificate. CE marking is not recognised.
gap.zh: 硬性差距——SRRC型式认可和CMIIT ID不被IFT承认；须通过IFT认可的OC另行申请IFT产品认证。MIIT NAL批准在墨西哥没有对应要求且不可转用。FCC测试报告（如有）在USMCA条款下可能有助于缩短IFT审查时间，但不能替代IFT证书。CE标志不被承认。
gap.zht: 硬性差距——SRRC型式認可和CMIIT ID不被IFT承認；須通過IFT認可的OC另行申請IFT產品認證。MIIT NAL批准在墨西哥沒有對應要求且不可轉用。FCC測試報告（如有）在USMCA條款下可能有助於縮短IFT審查時間，但不能取代IFT證書。CE標誌不被承認。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IFT homologacion is mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT devices imported or sold in Mexico. Chinese SRRC, CMIIT ID, and MIIT NAL documentation does not satisfy IFT requirements. A separate IFT application via an accredited OC is required. FCC test data may assist but does not replace the IFT certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IFT产品认证对所有进口或在墨西哥销售的Wi-Fi、蓝牙及蜂窝物联网设备为强制要求。中国SRRC、CMIIT ID及MIIT NAL文件不满足IFT要求。须通过认可OC另行提交IFT申请。FCC测试数据可提供参考但不能替代IFT证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IFT產品認證對所有進口或在墨西哥銷售的Wi-Fi、藍牙及蜂窩物聯網設備為強制要求。中國SRRC、CMIIT ID及MIIT NAL文件不滿足IFT要求。須通過認可OC另行提交IFT申請。FCC測試數據可提供參考但不能取代IFT證書。
